headline: SM Energy Surges 67% in Six Months: Is the Stock Worth Betting on Now?
summary: SM jumps 67% in six months as Civitas merger-fueled production growth and debt reduction strengthen its cash flow outlook.

headline: APA Corporation Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Higher Oil Prices
summary: APA tops Q1 earnings estimates as lower costs and stronger oil prices offset weaker revenues and output.

headline: How to Maximize Your Retirement Portfolio with These Top-Ranked Dividend Stocks
summary: The traditional retirement planning approaches no longer cover all expenses in nest egg years. So what can retirees do? Thankfully, there are alternative investments that provide steady, higher-rate income streams to replace dwindling bond yields.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on EOG Resources, Lowers Price Target to $196
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Hanwen Chang   maintains EOG Resources (NYSE:EOG) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $199 to $196.
